overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in Western attire exploring a misty mountain campsite and surrounding trails. The character walks through a temporary camp with canvas tents, then proceeds along a dirt path through rocky terrain, passing a wooden wagon and encountering a horse rider.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain campsite with canvas tents and supplies

events.description: character exits the campsite onto the open mountain trail

agents.ego_description: walking through the campsite examining the tents and supply barrels

entered.detail: large canvas tent with wooden poles in the campsite
stacked wooden barrels near the supply area
small campfire with stones arranged around it
large rocky cliff face forming the backdrop of the camp
wooden crates and boxes stacked near the tent

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a mountain campsite with canvas tents, wooden barrels, and supply crates scattered around. A campfire burns to the left as the character moves through the semi-enclosed rocky area before exiting onto the open trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with wooden barricades and wagon

events.description: passing a wooden wagon parked on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path leaving the campsite behind

notable_agents.action: wooden wagon parked stationary on the trail side

entered.detail: wooden fence structure blocking part of the path
old wooden wagon with tall stakes on the sides
tall pine trees scattered across the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the campsite and walks along a winding dirt path through grassy hills. A wooden wagon sits parked on the right side of the trail as the character passes by, with pine trees visible in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path between cliffs and boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow mountain trail between rock formations

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall rising on the left side
large scattered boulders along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between rocky cliff faces and boulders, with dense grass and wildflowers lining the trail. The misty mountain landscape stretches into the distance as the character continues along the winding path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with passing horse rider

events.description: encountering a horse rider traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail and passing a rider on horseback

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction along the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the rocky mountain path and passes a horse rider traveling in the opposite direction. The trail winds through grassy slopes with rocky outcrops on the left and misty valleys visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered mountain campsite out into a vast, misty wilderness. It begins by weaving through a semi-enclosed rocky area filled with canvas tents, wooden barrels, and a burning campfire before exiting onto an open trail. As the character leaves the camp, the scene expands into winding dirt paths and grassy hills, passing a parked wooden wagon with pine trees emerging through the haze. The path then narrows between towering rocky cliff faces and wildflowers, shifting the perspective toward a distant, fog-shrouded mountain landscape. Finally, the camera follows the character along grassy slopes and rocky outcrops as they pass a horse rider traveling in the opposite direction toward the misty valleys.
